sentences.arabic: تُعَدُّ قِيَمُ الكَرَمِ وَالضِّيَافَةِ فِي المِخْيَالِ العَرَبِيِّ رُكْنًا رَكِينًا لَا يَتَزَعْزَعُ.
sentences.translation: Vrijednosti darežljivosti i gostoprimstva u arapskom kolektivnom imaginarijumu predstavljaju nepokolebljiv stub.
sentences.translationEn: The values of generosity and hospitality in the Arab collective imagination represent an unshakeable pillar.

sentences.arabic: فَهِيَ لَيْسَتْ مُجَرَّدَ عَادَاتٍ عَابِرَةٍ، بَلْ هِيَ فَلْسَفَةٌ وُجُودِيَّةٌ صَاغَتْهَا قَسْوَةُ الصَّحْرَاءِ وَأَلْطَافُ المُرُوءَةِ.
sentences.translation: To nisu tek prolazni običaji, već egzistencijalna filozofija koju su oblikovale surovost pustinje i blagodati čojstva.
sentences.translationEn: These are not merely passing customs, but an existential philosophy forged by the harshness of the desert and the graces of chivalry.

sentences.arabic: لَقَدْ كَانَتْ نِيرَانُ القِرَى تُوقَدُ عَلَى رُؤُوسِ الجِبَالِ لِتَهْدِيَ السَّارِيَ الضَّلِيلَ فِي عَتَمَةِ اللَّيْلِ.
sentences.translation: Vatre gostoprimstva nekada su paljene na vrhovima brda kako bi vodile zalutale putnike u tami noći.
sentences.translationEn: In the past, hospitality fires were lit on mountaintops to guide lost travelers in the darkness of the night.

sentences.arabic: فَيَجِدَ فِي كَنَفِ المِضْيَافِ مَلَاذًا آمِنًا وَقِرًى سَابِغًا يُنْسِيهِ مَشَقَّةَ الطَّرِيقِ.
sentences.translation: Tako bi putnik u okrilju domaćina pronašao sigurno utočište i obilan obrok koji bi mu dao zaboraviti nedaće puta.
sentences.translationEn: Thus, the traveler would find in the host's protection a safe haven and an abundant meal that made him forget the hardships of the road.

sentences.arabic: حَيْثُ تَتَلَاشَى فُرُوقُ النَّسَبِ وَالمَكَانَةِ أَمَامَ حُرْمَةِ الضَّيْفِ المُقَدَّسَةِ الَّتِي لَا تَقْبَلُ التَّهَاوُنَ.
sentences.translation: Tu nestaju razlike u porijeklu i statusu pred svetim pravom gosta koje ne trpi zanemarivanje.
sentences.translationEn: Here, distinctions of lineage and status vanish before the sacred sanctity of the guest, which brooks no negligence.

sentences.arabic: هَذَا التَّجَذُّرُ التَّارِيخِيُّ يَنْعَكِسُ اليَوْمَ فِي طُقُوسِ تَقْدِيمِ القَهْوَةِ العَرَبِيَّةِ المُرَّةِ الَّتِي تَفُوحُ بِرَائِحَةِ الهَيْلِ.
sentences.translation: Ova historijska ukorijenjenost danas se ogleda u ritualima posluživanja gorke arapske kafe koja odiše mirisom kardamoma.
sentences.translationEn: This historical rooting is reflected today in the rituals of serving bitter Arabic coffee, fragrant with cardamom.

sentences.arabic: تِلْكَ القَهْوَةُ الَّتِي تَتَجَاوَزُ كَوْنَهَا مَشْرُوبًا لِتُصْبِحَ لُغَةً رَمْزِيَّةً تُفْصِحُ عَنِ التَّرْحَابِ وَالاحْتِرَامِ المُتَبَادَلِ.
sentences.translation: Ta kafa prevazilazi okvire običnog napitka i postaje simbolički jezik koji izražava dobrodošlicu i uzajamno poštovanje.
sentences.translationEn: This coffee transcends being a mere beverage to become a symbolic language expressing welcome and mutual respect.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّ الِاحْتِفَاءَ بِالغَرِيبِ لَيْسَ بَذْلًا لِلْمَالِ فَحَسْبُ، بَلْ هُوَ بَذْلٌ لِلنَّفْسِ وَإِعْلَاءٌ لِشَأْنِ الرَّابِطَةِ الإِنْسَانِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Gostoprimstvo prema strancu nije samo trošenje novca, već davanje sebe i uzdizanje ljudskih veza.
sentences.translationEn: Celebrating the stranger is not just the spending of money, but the giving of oneself and the elevation of human bonds.

sentences.arabic: هُوَ إِيثَارٌ يَتَرَفَّعُ عَنِ المَصَالِحِ الضَّيِّقَةِ وَيَنْشُدُ الرِّفْعَةَ فِي العَطَاءِ.
sentences.translation: To je nesebičnost koja se izdiže iznad uskih interesa i teži uzvišenosti kroz davanje.
sentences.translationEn: It is an altruism that rises above narrow interests and seeks nobility through giving.

sentences.arabic: وَهَكَذَا، يَبْقَى البَيْتُ العَرَبِيُّ مَفْتُوحَ الأَبْوَابِ لِكُلِّ طَارِقٍ يَبْحَثُ عَنِ الأُنْسِ وَالقِرَى.
sentences.translation: Tako arapski dom ostaje otvorenih vrata za svakog namjernika koji traži društvo i okrepljenje.
sentences.translationEn: Thus, the Arab home remains open-doored to every seeker of company and sustenance.

sentences.arabic: يُجَسِّدُ هَذَا المَسْلَكُ مِيثَاقًا أَخْلَاقِيًّا يَرَى فِي إِكْرَامِ الضَّيْفِ بَرَكَةً إِلَهِيَّةً تَحُلُّ عَلَى الدَّارِ.
sentences.translation: Ovakvo ponašanje utjelovljuje moralni pakt koji u ugošćavanju vidi božanski blagoslov koji se spušta na dom.
sentences.translationEn: This conduct embodies a moral covenant that sees in honoring the guest a divine blessing that descends upon the house.

sentences.arabic: وَفِي عَصْرِنَا الرَّقْمِيِّ الصَّاخِبِ، مَا زَالَتْ هَذِهِ التَّقَالِيدُ تُمَثِّلُ حِصْنًا مَنِيعًا لِلْهُوِيَّةِ الثَّقَافِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: U našem bučnom digitalnom dobu, ove tradicije i dalje predstavljaju neosvojivu tvrđavu kulturnog identiteta.
sentences.translationEn: In our clamorous digital age, these traditions still represent a formidable fortress of cultural identity.

sentences.arabic: حَيْثُ تَمْتَزِجُ فِيهَا حَرَارَةُ العَاطِفَةِ بِصِدْقِ الوِدَادِ فِي كُلِّ مَجْلِسٍ يَجْمَعُ الأَحِبَّةَ.
sentences.translation: U njima se toplina emocija miješa sa iskrenom naklonošću u svakom sijelu koje okuplja voljene.
sentences.translationEn: Therein, the warmth of emotion blends with sincere affection in every gathering of loved ones.

sentences.arabic: مِمَّا يَجْعَلُ مِنْ لِقَاءِ الضَّيْفِ عِيدًا مُتَجَدِّدًا يَحْتَفِي بِكَرَامَةِ الإِنْسَانِ وَنُبْلِ مَعَادِنِهِ.
sentences.translation: To susret s gostom čini vječno obnavljajućim praznikom koji slavi ljudsko dostojanstvo i plemenitost karaktera.
sentences.translationEn: This makes meeting a guest an ever-renewing festival that celebrates human dignity and the nobility of character.
